title: CoordsCopy
description: Tired of always manually copying down coordinates of the player's or a block's position? (I am.) Well, now you can copy them easily to the clipboard with the press of a button. 😉
body:
# CoordsCopy A fabricmc minecraft mod which enabled you to copy player coordinates and block coordinates with the press of a button. The mod provides you with a function to copy the coordinates of the block you're looking at directly into the clipboard by pressing one simple button. The coordinates will be formatted in the common format also used in commands, which is "x y z", (for example: -34 65 219). The mod is also able to copy your current player position into the clipboard using another key, formatted the same as the block coordinates. ### Current Features (v1.1): - Copy player coordinates - Copy targeted block coordinates ### Languages: - English - German - German (Austrian) ### Also available on: - [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/coordscopy)
